/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/gpu_detect.dir/src/gpu/gpu_detect.cu.o CMakeFiles/gpu_detect.dir/src/gpu/gpu_pipeline.cu.o CMakeFiles/gpu_detect.dir/src/gpu/kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/gpu_detect.dir/src/gpu/gemm.cu.o CMakeFiles/gpu_detect.dir/src/common/audio.cpp.o -o gpu_detect   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcufft.so /usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublas.so -lsndfile /usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublasLt.so /usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libculibos.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
